summary: Assert that an RGBA image's alpha lies in [0, 1] and (for a premultiplied image) every color channel satisfies |C| <= alpha. A violation fails the assertion and records the invalid-pixel count, worst constraint excess, and its pixel.

inputs.name: image
inputs.doc: The RGBA image whose alpha and premultiplied-color constraint are checked.

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The assertion verdict: pass/fail plus the invalid-pixel count, worst constraint excess, and worst pixel.

params.name: severity
params.doc: How a violation affects the run: `error` fails the run, `warning` marks the evidence, `metric` never fails.
